name: Chatham Community Center
description: Chatham Community Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Chatham, VA. There are 3 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are private.

name: Leesville Lake Marina
description: Pickleball by the Lake.  Courts are open on a first come basis and are open to the public.  This is a full-service marina including boat rental.  Swimming pool and restaurant are open to the public.
fees: Fee required — Court fee is $10/hour regardless of the number of players.
